emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Collect name, callback number, location, and nature of the issue. Then send a text alert.

call_transfer_rules.fail_message: Our emergency team has been notified and will contact you within 10 minutes. This is being escalated as a priority emergency.

integration_constraints: No auto-creation of jobs for electrical emergencies
No creation of inspection scheduling requests in ServiceTrade or FieldEdge
after_hours_flow_summary: Ask if issue is preventing operation, escalate to emergency if yes
notes: No auto job creation in ServiceTrade or FieldEdge, no daylight saving time changes
